query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users FROM users; SELECT COUNT(*) as premium_users FROM users WHERE isPremium = 1; SELECT COUNT(*) as admin_users FROM users WHERE role = 'admin'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as active_users FROM training_sets WHERE userId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sessions FROM training_sets;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users FROM users; SELECT COUNT(*) as premium_users FROM users WHERE isPremium = 1; SELECT COUNT(*) as admin_users FROM users WHERE role = 'admin'; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as active_users FROM training_sets WHERE userId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sessions FROM training_sets;
